channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【Insiders (version 1.111)】内部人员（版本 1.111）
item.description: 【Learn what is new in Visual Studio Code 1.111 (Insiders) Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 1.111 中的新增功能（内部人士） 阅读全文

item.title: 【What's new in Microsoft Foundry | February 2026】Microsoft Foundry 的新增功能 | 2026 年 2 月
item.description: 【TL;DR Claude Opus 4.6 + Sonnet 4.6: Anthropic's frontier models arrive in Foundry with 1M-token context (beta), adaptive thinking, and context compaction — Opus for deep reasoning, Sonnet for cost-efficient scale. GPT-Realtime-1.5 & GPT-Audio-1.5: Next-gen audio models w】TL;DR Claude Opus 4.6 + Sonnet 4.6：Anthropic 的前沿模型抵达 Foundry，具有 1M 代币上下文（测试版）、自适应思维和上下文压缩——Opus 用于深度推理，Sonnet 用于经济高效的规模。 GPT-Realtime-1.5 和 GPT-Audio-1.5：下一代音频模型

item.title: 【Prepare your add-in for Outlook ribbon improvements】准备加载项以改进 Outlook 功能区
item.description: 【We’re improving how add-ins appear on the ribbon in Outlook on the web and the new Outlook on Windows. These Outlook ribbon updates make add-ins easier to find and align the experience across Outlook clients. Improvements include: Showing the group name specified in your manifest for the add-in’s ribbon button (instead of the】我们正在改进加载项在 Outlook 网页版和新的 Windows 版 Outlook 功能区上的显示方式。这些 Outlook 功能区更新使加载项更易于查找并在 Outlook 客户端之间调整体验。改进包括： 显示在清单中为加载项的功能区按钮指定的组名称（而不是

item.title: 【Announcing TypeScript 6.0 RC】宣布推出 TypeScript 6.0 RC
item.description: 【Today we are excited to announce the Release Candidate (RC) of TypeScript 6.0! To get started using the RC, you can get it through npm with the following command: npm install -D typescript@rc TypeScript 6.0 is a unique release in t】今天，我们很高兴地宣布 TypeScript 6.0 的候选版本 (RC)！要开始使用 RC，您可以使用以下命令通过 npm 获取它： npm install -D typescript@rc TypeScript 6.0 是 t 中的唯一版本

item.title: 【Go 1.26.1-1 and 1.25.8-1 Microsoft builds now available】Go 1.26.1-1 和 1.25.8-1 Microsoft 版本现已推出
item.description: 【A new release of the Microsoft build of Go including security fixes is now available for download. For more information about this release and the changes included, see the table below: Microsoft Release Upstream Tag】包含安全修复程序的 Microsoft Go 版本新版本现已可供下载。有关此版本及其所包含更改的更多信息，请参阅下表： Microsoft 版本上游标签

item.title: 【When Read­Directory­ChangesW reports that a deletion occurred, how can I learn more about the deleted thing?】当 ReadDirectoryChangesW 报告发生删除时，我如何了解有关已删除内容的更多信息？
item.description: 【A customer was using Read­Directory­ChangesW to monitor changes to a directory. However, they ran into a problem when they received a FILE_ACTION_REMOVED notification: Since the notification is raised when the item is deleted, they can't do a Get­File­AttributesEx to find out whether】客户正在使用 ReadDirectoryChangesW 来监视目录的更改。但是，当他们收到 FILE_ACTION_REMOVED 通知时，他们遇到了问题：由于删除项目时会引发通知，因此他们无法执行 GetFileAttributesEx 来查明是否

item.title: 【Using Agents to Setup Experiments】使用代理设置实验
item.description: 【Introduction: The Problem In a recent engagement, our team faced a complex challenge. Setting up a machine learning experiment required a long sequence of manual steps. None were individually hard, but together they created a fragile, error‑prone workflow. For example: – Users needed to provide key metadata (experiment name, hy】简介：问题 在最近的一次合作中，我们的团队面临着复杂的挑战。设置机器学习实验需要一系列手动步骤。单独来看，这些工作流程并不困难，但它们一起创建了一个脆弱且容易出错的工作流程。例如： – 用户需要提供关键元数据（实验名称、hy

item.title: 【Windows Terminal Preview 1.25 Release】Windows 终端预览版 1.25 发布
item.description: 【We briefly paused our quarterly release cycle to focus on reliability and performance, but now we're back with Windows Terminal 1.25! We are also updating Windows Terminal stable to version 1.24, which will include all of the features from】我们短暂暂停了季度发布周期，以专注于可靠性和性能，但现在我们又带着 Windows Terminal 1.25 回来了！我们还将 Windows Terminal 稳定版更新至 1.24 版，其中包含来自

item.title: 【Release v1.0 of the official MCP C# SDK】发布官方MCP C# SDK v1.0
item.description: 【The Model Context Protocol (MCP) C# SDK has reached its v1.0 milestone, bringing full support for the 2025-11-25 version of the MCP Specifi】模型上下文协议 (MCP) C# SDK 已达到 v1.0 里程碑，全面支持 2025 年 11 月 25 日版本的 MCP 规范

item.title: 【Visual Studio at GDC Festival of Gaming 2026】Visual Studio 出席 2026 年 GDC 游戏节
item.description: 【Join us at GDC Festival of Gaming 2026 for a deep dive into Visual Studio, GitHub Copilot, PowerToys, and the Windows tools that speed up your daily dev workflow. We'll show how these tools work together to boost】欢迎参加 2026 年 GDC 游戏节，深入了解 Visual Studio、GitHub Copilot、PowerToys 以及可加快日常开发工作流程的 Windows 工具。我们将展示这些工具如何协同工作以促进
